headline: Nvidia's Jensen Huang Thinks the Software Sell-Off Is Wrong: 1 Great Stock to Buy on a Dip
summary: The high-profile CEO and artificial intelligence (AI) expert thinks software stocks have been unfairly sold off due to unwarranted fears about AI's role in software.
